div1.entryFree: Cockney, as it seems, a person who knows only the life and manners of the town, and is consequently well acquainted with affected phrases, but a stranger to what every child else knows: this great lubber, the world, will prove a c. Tw. IV, 1, 15. cry to it, as the c. did to the eels when she put 'em i' the paste alive, Lr. II, 4, 123.*
